message:
test(region): refactor heap lifecycle tests to use per-region heap_stats

Replace global_alloc_count() baseline tracking with direct per-region
heap_stats() assertions. This makes tests self-contained and eliminates
flakiness from concurrent test execution affecting global counters.

Changes:
- Rename global_alloc_count_returns_to_baseline_single_region →
  heap_stats_return_to_zero_single_region
- Rename global_alloc_count_multi_region_hierarchy →
  multi_region_hierarchy_reclamation
- Assert .live, .reclaimed, .allocations on each region individually
- Verify parent heap remains live while children close
- Use std::f64::consts::PI instead of 3.14f64 literal
- Add close_quiescence_regression.rs: 352-line regression suite
  exercising Lean theorems (close_implies_quiescent,
  close_quiescence_decomposition, close_children_exist_completed,
  close_subregions_exist_closed) with oracle evidence (bd-sbi6e)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
